name: dulus-skills
description: Agentic skills and plugins from the Dulus project (the Cigua Palmera 🦅). Real engines, not text prompts — starting with the AutoAdapter that turns any Python repo or MCP server into a working native plugin.

plugins.name: autoadapter
plugins.description: Turn any Python repo, package, or MCP server into a working native Dulus plugin with one command — powered by the real Dulus AutoAdapter engine (AI generation + real-export verification, not a scaffold).
